---
listing:
  contents: 
    - "posts/*/index.qmd"
  sort: "date asc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  feed: true
  sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: false
  image-align: left
  image-height: "8em"
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
---


# Observations about Teaching Finance + AI
